description: Two regulatory-claim overstatements: FDA PCCP framed as enforcing-mandate (it is final guidance for submissions), and EU AI Act Annex III missing Annex I/medical-device 2027 split.
preflight_check: For any pitch/GTM doc touching FDA or EU AI Act timing, run a quick primary-source check against the actual rule/guidance title before treating dates as enforcement-equivalent. Annex III vs Annex I (product-regulated) is a recurring source of confusion and should be the default check on any EU AI Act medical claim.

description: Two doc-accuracy issues on PR #584 governance/rules sync: CLAUDE.md claimed "4 total" CI workflows when 12 exist on origin/main + referenced nonexistent pr-nag.yml; AGENT_REGISTRY.md removed quality-arbiter row when quality-arbiter.yml was last successful 5min before the review.
preflight_check: For any PR whose primary change is documentation about runtime/repo state (CI workflows, agent registry, machine inventory, dependency lists, file paths in canonical docs), Stage-3 review MUST include at least one factual probe against origin/main (gh api .../contents/<path> or git log) BEFORE posting adopt. Diff-only review degrades to scope-vs-style on doc-sync PRs and misses factual drift. See memory feedback_doc_sync_pr_groundtruth_probe.md.

description: Tier-2 admission count mismatch — line 117 said Three but §5b removes MCP from admission set, actual count is 2 (c2pa-python + sigstore)
preflight_check: cross-reference numerical claims (counts, sums) against decision sections in same doc; CI lint could check Tier-2 list length vs explicit count words

description: Steward-loop-discipline §7 treated any push-to-remote as irreversible; over-blocked normal PR-branch fix-up pushes
README advertised future taxonomy as What is here while disk had old scaffold; split into Currently-in-repo + Planned-taxonomy with status column
preflight_check: check that every dir mentioned as Contents in README exists on disk OR is clearly labeled as planned/aspirational

description: ADR-0002 referenced uncommitted _state/swarm and claimed sources without public provenance; added public NSCA index URL plus internal-only clarification
preflight_check: grep ADR for _state/_internal references; if found, replace with public source or mark internal-only-not-committed

description: CONTRIBUTING pointed at exercises/_template.md which was absent and gitignored by _* pattern
preflight_check: grep CONTRIBUTING for file paths; verify each exists AND is not gitignored (git check-ignore)

description: Steward-loop-discipline §6 sibling-question scan capped at 1h; can miss longer-running open operator-disambiguation requests
preflight_check: flag any rule that prescribes wall-clock time window for searching bus history; prefer artifact/lane scope unless time bound is explicitly justified

description: eval() on ffprobe r_frame_rate metadata is reachable code-injection
preflight_check: grep -E " eval\(" $path

description: division by zero on fps and total_frames in _extract_key_frames / _detect_visual_changes / _create_summary_prompt
preflight_check: look for divisions or range-steps that depend on values pulled from external probes

description: section parser stored heading text as key but lookups used numeric index
preflight_check: trace dict.set keys vs dict.get keys before merge

description: SKILL.md frontmatter missing version, execution-mode, argument-hint per skill-quality.md
preflight_check: lint script for SKILL.md frontmatter required fields

description: fleet/SKILL.md Live Context hardcoded huxley paths (/Users/others/...)
preflight_check: grep for absolute paths in skill Live Context blocks

description: _ensure_local does not handle bare YouTube IDs despite docs claim and /video-youtube trigger
preflight_check: cross-check argument-hint and SKILL.md trigger list against entry-point code

description: preserve raw stash bytes when materializing python files (utf-8 re-encode corrupts non-utf-8 PEP-263 declarations)
preflight_check: subprocess.run with text=True on git show output coerces utf-8 decode; require bytes mode for blob extraction

description: return nonzero when --stash ref cannot be resolved (rc=0 conflates "ref invalid" with "stash empty")
preflight_check: validate stash ref via git rev-parse --verify <ref>^{commit} before path enumeration; rc=2 on missing

description: Capability brief claimed Six readiness assessments; only Five exist in production (sitemap + readiness/*.html confirmed)
preflight_check: before publishing claims about quantity of shipped artifacts, count files on disk + sitemap entries

description: Three broken anchor links in capability-brief.html targeted case-studies.html#case-* IDs that do not exist on the page
preflight_check: for each href=PAGE.html#ANCHOR verify grep id=ANCHOR exists in target page

description: capability-brief.pdf binary contained stale Meta-Systems lexicon; PDF was generated before P1-A web lexicon fix in PR #217 and never regenerated
preflight_check: any PR that changes rendered tokens in HTML must also regenerate any PDF mirroring that HTML

description: G3 case study draft contained '146,000+ governance events' vs '~12,000' specific numbers with no verifiable source on machine; substituted partner_lane_4 Big 4 fabrications incident which is documented in gemini-guardrails rule #22
preflight_check: before publishing case study, every named incident must grep-verify in canonical sources (gemini-guardrails, MEMORY.md, contributing memory files)

description: G3 case study draft contained 'Theater Commander' self-promoted title with no source on machine; substituted with verified Gemini (agent) parenthetical-variant violation
preflight_check: any specific identity-fabrication example must grep-verify in gemini-guardrails Approved Identity section before shipping

description: cases.json production-agent-governance.insight contained 'deletion of other agents' work' violation type with no source; substituted with verified violation types (phantom deliverables, identity fabrication, scope modifications)
preflight_check: every comma-separated violation type in case-study insight must grep-verify in canonical violation history

description: G3 case study merged without sitemap.xml entry; live URL would not be discovered by search crawlers
preflight_check: any PR adding a new file under web/case-studies/ web/readiness/ web/audit/ web/primitives/ must include matching sitemap.xml <url> entry

description: verify_finding strips unit/trailing-word context before grep — theoretical false-positive risk on numeric+unit and multiplier patterns; conservative-by-default (fails toward false-NEGATIVE not false-POSITIVE), zero false-positives observed in self-test on 3 shipped surfaces, escape hatch is the WARN severity
preflight_check: for verifier-class scripts, the grep-needle should preserve full context (number+unit, multiplier+trigger-word) not just the leading token; tighten in follow-up PR after observing real-world behavior on >5 case studies

description: [VERIFY: basis] inline marker documented in SKILL.md as escape hatch but not parsed by the verifier script — doc-vs-code gap
preflight_check: when SKILL.md documents an in-content microformat (like [VERIFY:]), the underlying script must parse it OR the doc must remove the claim; cross-check on every skill-script pair before merge

description: SHA_REF_RE defined at script L101 but never invoked — dead code, missing wire-up for SHA references in case studies
preflight_check: static-analysis pass on script: every top-level regex constant must have at least one .finditer/.search/.match call; ruff/mypy unused-binding rule

description: CODE_IDENT_RE requires uppercase first character (`[A-Z][^<]{1,50}`) which bypasses lowercase HUMMBL agent identities (claude-code, codex, gemini, sov, echo) — these are exactly the identities most likely to appear in agent-related case studies, and the regex misses them
preflight_check: when matching domain-specific identifiers, validate the character class against actual domain conventions (HUMMBL canonical agent identities are bare lowercase per bus-protocol.md)

description: grep_canonical re-reads each canonical-source file once per finding (O(N findings × M files)) instead of pre-reading once and matching against cached content (O(N+M))
preflight_check: when verifier loops over findings × sources, read source contents once into a dict before the finding loop

description: G2 case study (PR #216) shipped with '12x metric inflation' + '146,000+ governance events' + 'actual 12,000' phantom citations — same pattern fixed on G3 in PR #221; missed by PR #220 which only fixed capability-brief; surfaced by PR #222 verifier inline self-test
preflight_check: run scripts/case_study_verify.py against web/case-studies/*.html before any case-study merge — the gate now exists post PR #222 to enforce this
loop_closure: PR #220 G2 audit missed this (scoped to capability-brief only); PR #221 G3 audit caught the same pattern type; PR #222 verifier shipped; PR #223 closes the residual the verifier flagged

description: G2 case study contained 'Theater Commander' self-promoted role with no source on machine — same pattern fixed on G3 in PR #221
preflight_check: verifier code-ident pattern catches identity tags; current uppercase-first regex misses lowercase identities (P2 in Arbiter L26); broaden character class in verifier hardening PR

description: G2 case study contained 'deletion of another agent's research artifacts mid-session' violation type with no source on machine
preflight_check: every comma-separated violation type in case-study insight must grep-verify in canonical violation history before publishing

description: G2 case study claimed 'Q1 2026' probationary timeframe but Gemini AIP began 2026-04-11 (Q2) per gemini-guardrails.md ACTIVE-UNDER-AIP date — chronology slip not caught by PR #220 audit
preflight_check: verifier should add temporal-quarter-or-year claim detection (Q1 2026, Q2 2026, etc) and grep-verify against canonical date range; defer to verifier hardening PR
